summary: Adds a pure validation utility and wires it into three existing geometry system init() paths plus a render-loop gate. No new runtime dependencies, no changes to public interfaces, no data flow alterations. The plan is well-scoped and the reviewer corrections are accurate.
strengths: Pure validation utility with no side effects — easy to test and reason about
Each geometry system defines its own REQUIRED_ATTRIBUTES constant, correctly reflecting that particleField lacks a color attribute
Render-loop gate is fail-safe: draw() is skipped but the loop continues (camera, audio still tick)
Validation runs once at init, not per-frame — negligible performance cost
Reviewer corrections are sound and already incorporated into the plan's intent

concerns.description: renderLoop.ts has two init branches (initAllForValidation path and standard init path). The plan's step 6 must wrap both branches, not just one. The reviewer correction flags this but the step description is still ambiguous.
concerns.recommendation: Implementer should place the try/catch and geometryValid flag around the entire if/else block at lines 164-177, not inside either branch.

concerns.description: The GeometrySystem interface in types.ts declares init() as returning void. If init() now throws on validation failure, callers must handle this. The plan accounts for this in step 6 via try/catch but does not update the interface JSDoc.
concerns.recommendation: Add a @throws annotation to the init() method signature in types.ts to document the new contract.

concerns.description: The initAllForValidation path (US-048/US-049) already has its own error-collection mechanism via errorCollector. Geometry validation errors should integrate with this collector rather than only throwing.
concerns.recommendation: In the initAllForValidation branch, consider pushing geometry validation errors to errorCollector in addition to (or instead of) throwing, so all validation results are reported through a single channel.

dependency_analysis.downstream_risk: None — this adds a defensive check layer without changing any public API or data flow
dependency_analysis.interface_changes: AttributeSpec type added to types.ts (additive, non-breaking)

testing_assessment.notes: Unit tests for the pure validator plus integration tests in each system's existing test file. Manual verification step included. Coverage of the render-loop gate is implicit via the system tests but could benefit from a dedicated renderLoop test if one exists.
